SEARCH
Package io.github.javainvaders

Class Alien.RadialBomb

java.lang.Object
io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
io.github.javainvaders.Alien.RadialBomb
Enclosing class:
Alien
public static class Alien.RadialBomb extends Alien.Bomb
A bomb fired by the boss that travels outward at a fixed angle instead of straight down. Rotates visually as it moves.
Author:
Larissa R. G.; Vinicius S. F.

  • Constructor Details

    • RadialBomb

      public RadialBomb(float x, float y, float angle)
      Creates a radial bomb fired from (x, y) in the given direction angle.
      Parameters:
      x - origin X (boss center)
      y - origin Y (boss center)
      angle - direction in radians (0 = right, PI/2 = up)
